description: Convert existing UE or fallback runtime artifacts into the unified harness execution/verifier schema.
physical_assumptions: Runtime artifacts are evidence, not planner instructions.
UE, fallback, and SIM_PROXY source types must remain labeled.
Video existence is not sufficient without trajectory/contact evidence.
verifier_rules: Normalize position, velocity, rotation, and contact events.
Preserve run id and output directory.
Write machine-readable and human-readable diagnosis artifacts.
repair_suggestions: Do not merge UE and fallback without source labels.
regression_cases: local reference: draft_1782674415850_575607 should fail F4 if artifacts are present
